questions.question: Ek BEV ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Basic Electric Vehicle

questions.explanation: BEV ka full form Battery Electric Vehicle hota hai, jismein vehicle poori tarah battery power par chalti hai.

questions.question: EVs mein 'range anxiety' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Gaadi ki speed kam hone ka darr
options.B: Battery charge khatam hone ka darr raste mein
options.C: Charging station na milne ka darr

questions.explanation: Range anxiety ka matlab hai battery charge khatam hone ka darr aur raste mein charging station na milne ka darr, jisse driver destination tak pahunch paayega ya nahi, iski chinta hoti hai.

questions.question: Kon sa EV type petrol engine aur electric motor dono use karta hai, jise battery charge karne ki zaroorat nahi padti?

options.B: PHEV (Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle)

questions.explanation: HEV (Hybrid Electric Vehicle) mein petrol engine aur electric motor dono hote hain, aur iski battery ko external source se charge karne ki zaroorat nahi padti, woh engine ya regenerative braking se charge hoti hai.

questions.question: Electric current ki unit kya hai?

options.B: Ampere

questions.explanation: Electric current ko Ampere (A) mein maapa jaata hai. Volt voltage ki unit hai, Watt power ki aur Ohm resistance ki.

questions.question: EV mein sabse common battery type kaunsa hai?

options.B: Nickel-metal hydride (NiMH)

questions.explanation: Modern EVs mein Lithium-ion batteries sabse zyada use hoti hain unki high energy density aur long life ke kaaran.

questions.question: EVs ke major environmental benefit kya hain?

options.B: Zero tailpipe emissions

questions.explanation: EVs zero tailpipe emissions provide karte hain aur ICE vehicles ke comparison mein kam noise pollution karte hain, jo environmental benefits hain.

questions.question: DC current ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Current jo direction periodically change karta hai
options.B: Current jo sirf ek direction mein flow karta hai
options.C: Current jo high voltage par hota hai
options.D: Current jo low voltage par hota hai

questions.explanation: DC (Direct Current) woh current hai jo sirf ek direction mein flow karta hai. Batteries aur electronic circuits DC current use karte hain.

questions.question: EV powertrain mein kis component ka kaam battery se aane wali DC power ko motor ke liye AC power mein convert karna hai?

options.B: Battery Management System (BMS)

questions.explanation: Inverter DC power ko AC power mein convert karta hai, jo ki electric motor ko drive karne ke liye zaroori hai. Converter ek DC voltage level ko dusre DC voltage level mein badalta hai.

questions.question: Ek EV ki 'energy consumption' ko kis unit mein maapa jaata hai?

options.B: Kilowatt-hours (kWh)

questions.explanation: Energy consumption ko Kilowatt-hours (kWh) mein maapa jaata hai, jo ek EV ki battery capacity aur kitni energy woh use karti hai, use darshata hai. kW power ki unit hai.

questions.question: EV mein regenerative braking ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Battery ko charge karta hai

questions.explanation: Regenerative braking gaadi ki kinetic energy ko electricity mein convert karke battery ko charge karta hai, jisse brake wear kam hota hai aur gaadi ki range badhti hai.

questions.question: FCEV ka full form kya hai aur yeh kaise power generate karta hai?

options.A: Fuel Cell Electric Vehicle; hydrogen aur oxygen se electricity banata hai
options.B: Fast Charging Electric Vehicle; high power charging use karta hai
options.C: Fuel Combustion Electric Vehicle; fuel ko jalakar electricity banata hai
options.D: Full Cycle Electric Vehicle; poora cycle electricity par chalta hai

questions.explanation: FCEV ka matlab Fuel Cell Electric Vehicle hai, jo hydrogen aur oxygen ko combine karke electricity generate karta hai, jisse motor chalti hai aur sirf paani exhaust hota hai.

questions.question: EVs mein power loss ko kam karne ke liye kon si technology use hoti hai?

options.B: Efficient motor designs

questions.explanation: Efficient motor designs, jaise Permanent Magnet Synchronous Motors (PMSM), EVs mein power loss ko kam karne aur efficiency badhane mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Ek EV mein 'thermal management system' ka primary role kya hai?

options.B: Battery aur motor ko optimum temperature par maintain karna

questions.explanation: Thermal management system battery aur electric motor ko optimum working temperature par maintain karta hai, jisse unki performance, efficiency aur life badhti hai.

questions.question: Bharat mein EV adoption ko promote karne ke liye government ki ek scheme ka naam bataiye.

options.B: FAME India

questions.explanation: FAME (Faster Adoption and Manufacturing of Hybrid and Electric Vehicles) India scheme government dwara EVs ko promote karne ke liye shuru ki gayi hai, jisme subsidies aur charging infrastructure development shamil hai.

questions.question: PHEV aur BEV mein kya main difference hai?

options.A: PHEV mein petrol engine hota hai, BEV mein nahi
options.B: PHEV ko plug-in karke charge karna padta hai, BEV ko nahi
options.C: BEV ki range kam hoti hai PHEV se
options.D: PHEV mein regenerative braking nahi hoti

questions.explanation: PHEV (Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle) mein ek petrol engine aur ek electric motor dono hote hain, aur iski battery ko external source se bhi charge kiya ja sakta hai. BEV (Battery Electric Vehicle) mein sirf electric motor hoti hai aur woh poori tarah battery par chalti hai.

questions.question: Ek high-voltage EV battery pack ko dismantle karte samay sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: High-voltage system ko safely shut down aur disable karna

questions.explanation: High-voltage EV battery pack ke saath kaam karte samay, sabse pehle high-voltage system ko safely shut down aur disable karna zaroori hai, taaki electric shock ka khatra na ho.

questions.question: EVs mein 'V2G' technology ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Vehicle to Grid

questions.explanation: V2G (Vehicle-to-Grid) technology mein EV apni battery mein stored extra electricity ko power grid mein wapas bhej sakti hai, jab grid ko zaroorat ho.

questions.question: EV battery ki capacity ko kis unit mein express kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Amperes (A)

questions.explanation: EV battery ki capacity ko Kilowatt-hours (kWh) mein express kiya jaata hai, jo usmein store ki ja sakne wali total energy ko darshata hai.

questions.question: BMS (Battery Management System) ka main kaam kya hai?

options.B: Battery cells ko monitor aur balance karna

questions.explanation: BMS (Battery Management System) battery cells ke voltage, current aur temperature ko monitor karta hai, aur unhe balance rakhta hai, jisse battery ki safety aur life badhti hai.

questions.question: Li-ion batteries ka ek disadvantage kya hai?

options.B: Long cycle life

questions.explanation: Li-ion batteries mein high energy density hoti hai, lekin unmein thermal runaway ka risk hota hai agar unhe properly manage na kiya jaaye, jisse overheating ya aag lag sakti hai.

questions.question: Battery pack mein cells ko thanda rakhne ke liye kaun sa system use hota hai?

options.B: Liquid cooling

questions.explanation: Battery packs ko thanda rakhne ke liye air cooling, liquid cooling ya passive cooling jaise systems use kiye jaate hain, taaki cells optimum temperature par operate karein.

questions.question: Ek EV battery ki 'cycle life' kya darshati hai?

options.B: Battery kitne baar charge aur discharge ho sakti hai

questions.explanation: Battery ki cycle life yeh darshati hai ki battery apni original capacity ka ek certain percentage maintain karte hue kitne full charge-discharge cycles complete kar sakti hai.

questions.question: Agar EV battery pack mein koi damage ho, toh kya action lena chahiye?

options.A: Turant repair karne ki koshish karein
options.B: Vehicle ko drive karte rahein
options.C: Qualified technician ko inform karein aur safety protocols follow karein

questions.explanation: Damage EV battery pack ke saath kaam karna khatarnak ho sakta hai. Hamesha qualified technician ko inform karein aur high-voltage safety protocols ko follow karein.

questions.question: EV battery pack ke andar individual cells ko monitor karne ka main reason kya hai?

options.A: Gaadi ka music system control karna
options.B: Cell voltage aur temperature ko balance karna

questions.explanation: Individual cells ko monitor karne se unke voltage aur temperature ko balance rakha ja sakta hai, jisse battery pack ki overall performance, safety aur life badhti hai.

questions.question: EV battery ki 'state of charge' (SOC) kya batati hai?

options.B: Battery mein kitni energy bachi hai

questions.explanation: State of Charge (SOC) battery mein bachi hui energy ko percentage mein darshati hai, jaise phone ki battery percentage.

questions.question: High voltage battery pack par kaam karte samay kaun sa PPE (Personal Protective Equipment) zaroori hai?

options.B: Insulated gloves

questions.explanation: High voltage battery pack par kaam karte samay safety glasses, insulated gloves aur flame-retardant clothing jaise PPEs zaroori hain, taaki electric shock aur aag se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: EV battery pack mein 'series' connection ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Total current badhata hai
options.D: Battery ka weight kam karta hai

questions.explanation: Cells ko series mein connect karne se total voltage badhta hai, jo EV motor ko high power supply karne ke liye zaroori hai. Parallel connection current aur capacity badhata hai.

questions.question: Nickel-metal hydride (NiMH) batteries ka ek common use case kya hai EV industry mein?

options.B: Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicles (PHEVs)

questions.explanation: NiMH batteries historically full Hybrid Electric Vehicles (HEVs) mein common thi, jaise Toyota Prius, unki reliability aur cost-effectiveness ke kaaran. Modern BEVs zyada Li-ion use karte hain.

questions.question: Battery pack ki 'degradation' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Battery ki capacity aur performance ka samay ke saath kam hona

questions.explanation: Battery degradation ka matlab hai battery ki maximum charge holding capacity aur power delivery ability ka samay ke saath kam hona, jo natural aging aur usage ke kaaran hota hai.

questions.question: EV battery pack ko replace karne se pehle kya precaution lena chahiye?

options.B: Ignition off karna aur high-voltage disconnect karna

questions.explanation: EV battery pack ko replace karne se pehle, ignition off karna aur high-voltage system ko disconnect karna (service plug remove karna) sabse zaroori safety precaution hai.

questions.question: EV battery mein 'thermal runaway' ko rokne ke liye BMS kya karta hai?

options.A: Battery ko zyada charge hone deta hai
options.B: Temperature ko monitor karta hai aur cooling system ko activate karta hai
options.C: Battery ko zyada discharge hone deta hai
options.D: Battery cells ko disconnect kar deta hai bina warning ke

questions.explanation: BMS battery cell temperatures ko continuously monitor karta hai aur agar temperature kisi critical point se zyada ho, toh cooling system ko activate karta hai ya power output ko limit karta hai, taaki thermal runaway ko roka ja sake.

questions.question: EV battery pack mein 'busbars' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Individual cells ko mechanical support dena
options.C: Cells ke beech electrical connection provide karna

questions.explanation: Busbars thick metallic strips hoti hain jo battery pack ke andar individual cells ya modules ke beech low-resistance electrical connection provide karti hain, high currents ko safely carry karne ke liye.

questions.question: Ek EV battery pack ki 'power density' kya darshati hai?

options.A: Kitni energy store kar sakti hai
options.B: Kitni jaldi energy deliver kar sakti hai

questions.explanation: Power density yeh darshati hai ki battery kitni jaldi energy deliver kar sakti hai (i.e., kitni power output de sakti hai), jo acceleration aur high-speed driving ke liye important hai. Energy density kitni energy store kar sakti hai, yeh batati hai.

questions.question: EV battery pack ko recycle karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Valuable materials recover karne ke liye
options.B: Environmental pollution kam karne ke liye
options.C: Hazardous waste ko properly manage karne ke liye

questions.explanation: EV battery packs mein valuable materials hote hain jinhe recover kiya ja sakta hai. Recycling environmental pollution ko kam karta hai aur hazardous waste ko safely dispose karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: EV mein electric motor ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Wheels ko ghumana

questions.explanation: Electric motor battery se electricity lekar wheels ko ghumane ke liye mechanical power generate karti hai, jisse vehicle chalti hai.

questions.question: EV motor controller (inverter) ka main role kya hai?

options.B: Battery voltage ko control karna
options.C: Motor ki speed aur torque control karna

questions.explanation: Motor controller (inverter) battery se aane wali DC power ko motor ke liye variable frequency aur voltage AC power mein convert karta hai, jisse motor ki speed aur torque control hoti hai.

questions.question: Regenerative braking mein motor kaise kaam karti hai?

options.B: Generator ki tarah kaam karti hai

questions.explanation: Regenerative braking ke dauran, electric motor generator ki tarah kaam karti hai, vehicle ki kinetic energy ko electricity mein convert karke battery ko charge karti hai.

questions.question: Permanent Magnet Synchronous Motor (PMSM) ka ek fayda kya hai?

options.B: High power density

questions.explanation: PMSM motors high power density aur high efficiency provide karti hain, isliye yeh modern EVs mein bahut common hain.

questions.question: EV drive train mein 'reduction gear' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Motor ke torque ko badhana aur speed kam karna

questions.explanation: Reduction gear motor ki high rotational speed ko kam karta hai aur torque ko badhata hai, jisse wheels ko zaroori power milti hai. EVs mein single-speed reduction gear common hai.

questions.question: EV mein power electronics ka kya role hai?

options.B: Electrical power ko efficiently control aur convert karna

questions.explanation: Power electronics devices jaise inverters aur converters electrical power ko efficiently control aur convert karte hain, jo EV powertrain ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Induction motors (asynchronous motors) ka ek characteristic kya hai?

options.B: Unmein rotor current induced hota hai
options.D: Woh sirf DC power par chalte hain

questions.explanation: Induction motors mein rotor current stator ke rotating magnetic field dwara induce hota hai. Inmein permanent magnets nahi hote aur yeh AC power par chalte hain.

questions.question: Ek EV motor mein 'stator' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Rotor ko ghumana

questions.explanation: Stator motor ka stationary part hota hai jisme windings hoti hain. Jab current in windings se guzarta hai, toh ek rotating magnetic field create hota hai jo rotor ko ghumata hai.

questions.question: EV motor ke liye cooling system kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Motor ko overcharge hone se bachane ke liye
options.B: Motor ki efficiency aur life badhane ke liye
options.C: Vehicle ke interior ko thanda rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Electric motors high power output ke dauran heat generate karti hain. Cooling system unhe optimum temperature par maintain karta hai, jisse unki performance, efficiency aur life badhti hai.

questions.question: EV mein 'on-board charger' ka kya function hai?

options.B: AC grid power ko DC mein convert karke battery charge karna

questions.explanation: On-board charger AC grid power (jaise ghar ki supply) ko DC power mein convert karta hai, jisse EV ki high voltage battery charge ho sakti hai. DC fast chargers mein yeh conversion station par hota hai.

questions.question: EV transmission system mein 'differential' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Wheels ko alag-alag speed par ghumane dena

questions.explanation: Differential wheels ko alag-alag speed par ghumane deta hai, jo corners lete samay zaroori hai, taaki gaadi smoothly turn kar sake.

questions.question: EV motor ke 'torque' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Motor ki rotational force

questions.explanation: Torque motor ki rotational force ko darshata hai, jo gaadi ko accelerate karne aur hills par chadhne ke liye zaroori hai. EVs high instant torque ke liye jaane jaate hain.

questions.question: EV motor ke winding insulation ki health check karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Gaadi ki paint quality check karne ke liye
options.B: Short circuits aur electrical failures se bachne ke liye
options.C: Tires ki condition check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Motor winding insulation ki health check karna bahut zaroori hai, kyuki damaged insulation short circuits, electrical failures aur safety hazards ka kaaran ban sakta hai. Iske liye insulation resistance test kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: EV motor ke control mein 'Pulse Width Modulation' (PWM) ka kya role hai?

options.A: Motor ki physical size control karna
options.B: Motor ko supply ki gayi average voltage control karna
options.D: Motor ke noise level control karna

questions.explanation: PWM ek technique hai jismein motor ko supply ki gayi average voltage ko pulses ki width (duration) ko vary karke control kiya jaata hai, jisse motor ki speed aur torque smoothly adjust hoti hai.

questions.question: EV motor mein bearings ka failure kis wajah se ho sakta hai?

options.B: Under-lubrication ya contamination

questions.explanation: Motor bearings ka failure under-lubrication, contamination (dust, water), excessive load, ya improper installation ke kaaran ho sakta hai, jisse friction badhta hai aur wear hota hai.

questions.question: Electric motor ke stator windings mein short circuit detect karne ka ek tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Motor ke resistance ko measure karna (multimeter se)

questions.explanation: Stator windings mein short circuit detect karne ke liye multimeter se resistance measure kiya ja sakta hai. Agar resistance expected value se considerably kam ho, toh short circuit ho sakta hai.

questions.question: EV mein 'transaxle' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Motor, reduction gear aur differential ko ek unit mein combine karna

questions.explanation: Transaxle ek compact unit hai jo motor, reduction gear aur differential ko combine karti hai, khas kar front-wheel-drive EVs mein, jisse space bachta hai aur drivetrain simple hota hai.

questions.question: Level 2 EV charging mein kaun sa power source use hota hai?

options.B: 240V AC outlet

questions.explanation: Level 2 charging mein 240V AC outlet use hota hai, jo Level 1 se tez charge karta hai aur ghar ya public charging stations par common hai.

questions.question: DC fast charging ko Level 3 charging bhi kehte hain. Iska main fayda kya hai?

options.B: Sabse tez charging option
options.C: Ghar par install karna aasaan hai
options.D: Sabse kam power consume karta hai

questions.explanation: DC fast charging (Level 3) sabse tez charging option hai, jo EV ko kuch hi minutes mein 80% tak charge kar sakta hai, lambi yatraon ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: India mein public DC fast charging ke liye kaun sa connector standard ban raha hai?

options.B: CHAdeMO

questions.explanation: India mein CCS2 (Combined Charging System 2) DC fast charging ke liye preferred standard ban raha hai, jo AC aur DC charging dono ko support karta hai.

questions.question: EV charging station par 'earthing' kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Electric shock se bachne ke liye aur safety ke liye
options.C: Charging cable ko thanda rakhne ke liye
options.D: Charger ko sundar dikhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Earthing (grounding) electric shock se bachne aur electrical safety ensure karne ke liye bahut zaroori hai, khas kar high voltage charging systems mein.

questions.question: EV ko pani mein ya bahut geeli jagah par charge karte samay kya precaution lena chahiye?

options.B: Charging cable ko tightly wrap karein
options.C: Ensure karein ki charging equipment aur connector dry hon
options.D: Charger par plastic sheet daal dein

questions.explanation: Pani electrical conductivity badhata hai aur shock ka khatra badha deta hai. Hamesha ensure karein ki charging equipment aur connector dry hon aur pani ke contact mein na aayein.

questions.question: Kisi EV mein high voltage system par kaam karte samay, 'lockout/tagout' procedure ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Energy sources ko disable aur tag karna

questions.explanation: Lockout/tagout procedure mein high voltage system ko disconnect karke use lock kar diya jaata hai aur warning tags lagaye jaate hain, taaki galti se bhi koi system ko energize na kar de.

questions.question: Bharat EV Charger specification ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: International standards ko follow karta hai
options.B: India ke liye specific aur cost-effective charging solution provide karta hai
options.C: Sirf luxury EVs ko charge karta hai
options.D: Sirf AC charging support karta hai

questions.explanation: Bharat EV Charger specification India ke liye develop kiya gaya hai, jo local conditions aur requirements ke hisaab se cost-effective aur robust charging solution provide karta hai.

questions.question: EV charging cable ko damage se bachane ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Usko gadi ke niche se nikalna
options.C: Carefully handle karna aur proper storage mein rakhna

questions.explanation: Charging cable ko carefully handle karna aur use proper storage mein rakhna uske damage ko rokta hai, jisse safety aur functionality maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: EV charging station par 'overload protection' kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Charger ki speed badhane ke liye
options.B: Electrical system ko damage se bachane ke liye
options.C: Charging cable ko lamba karne ke liye
options.D: Charging cost kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Overload protection electrical circuits ko excessive current flow se hone wale damage se bachati hai, jisse aag ya equipment failure ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Ek EV fire emergency mein, kis type ke extinguisher ka use karna chahiye?

options.B: Foam extinguisher
options.C: Class D (metal fire) ya CO2 extinguisher

questions.explanation: EV battery fires mein high voltage aur lithium jaise reactive metals shamil ho sakte hain. Isliye Class D (metal fire) extinguisher ya CO2 extinguisher recommended hain. Paani ya foam electric shock ka khatra badha sakte hain.

questions.question: EV charging infrastructure mein 'smart charging' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf mobile app se charge karna
options.B: Charging process ko schedule aur optimize karna

questions.explanation: Smart charging mein charging process ko optimize kiya jaata hai, jaise peak hours mein charging avoid karna, renewable energy se charge karna, ya grid stability maintain karna, jisse cost aur load manage hota hai.

questions.question: EV charging ke liye 'Type 2' connector ka ek common naam kya hai?

options.B: Mennekes

questions.explanation: Type 2 connector ko 'Mennekes' connector bhi kehte hain aur yeh Europe aur India mein AC charging ke liye ek common standard hai.

questions.question: High voltage EV cables ko kaise identify kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Green colour se

questions.explanation: High voltage EV cables ko generally distinctive orange colour se identify kiya jaata hai, taaki technicians aur emergency personnel ko high voltage components ki pehchan ho sake.

questions.question: EV charging station par 'Residual Current Device' (RCD) kyon lagaya jaata hai?

options.B: Earth leakage current se protection ke liye

questions.explanation: RCD (ya RCCB) earth leakage current ko detect karta hai aur power supply ko turant disconnect kar deta hai, jisse electric shock ka khatra kam hota hai, khas kar jab koi fault ho.

questions.question: Agar EV charging cable garm ho rahi hai, toh iska kya matlab ho sakta hai?

options.B: Under-current flow ho raha hai
options.C: Overload ya loose connection ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: Charging cable ka excessive garm hona overload, loose connection, ya cable damage ka sanket ho sakta hai, jo safety hazard create kar sakta hai.

questions.question: EV charging process mein 'handshake protocol' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Charger aur vehicle ke beech communication establish karna
options.B: Charging speed increase karna

questions.explanation: Handshake protocol charger aur EV ke beech communication establish karta hai, jismein vehicle apni battery status aur required charging parameters batati hai, aur charger uske hisaab se power supply adjust karta hai.

questions.question: EV ko public charging station par charge karte samay, kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Charging etiquette aur parking rules follow karna
options.D: Charging port ko khula chhod dena

questions.explanation: Public charging stations par charging etiquette aur parking rules follow karna zaroori hai, taaki sabhi users ko suvidha mil sake aur parking spaces ka sahi upyog ho.

questions.question: EV ki routine maintenance mein kaun sa check shamil nahi hota hai?

options.B: Brake fluid level check

questions.explanation: EVs mein internal combustion engine nahi hota, isliye engine oil change ki zaroorat nahi padti. Baaki sab checks routine EV maintenance ka part hain.

questions.question: EV mein 'Brake Fluid' ki importance kya hai?

options.B: Braking system ko hydraulic pressure provide karna

questions.explanation: Brake fluid braking system mein hydraulic pressure transfer karta hai, jisse brake pedal dabane par calipers activate hote hain aur gaadi rukti hai. Yeh EVs aur ICE vehicles dono mein zaroori hai.

questions.question: EV diagnostic tool 'OBD-II scanner' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Vehicle ke onboard computer se error codes read karna

questions.explanation: OBD-II (On-Board Diagnostics II) scanner vehicle ke onboard computer se diagnostic trouble codes (DTCs) ko read karta hai, jisse technicians faults ko identify kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar EV mein 'Check EV System' warning light aati hai, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant drive karte rehna
options.C: Gaadi ko safe jagah par park karna aur qualified technician se check karwana

questions.explanation: Warning light aane par gaadi ko safe jagah par park karna aur qualified technician se check karwana zaroori hai, kyuki yeh high voltage system mein serious fault ka sanket ho sakta hai.

questions.question: EV battery ke 'State of Health' (SOH) ko kaise determine karte hain?

options.A: Battery ka physical colour dekh kar
options.B: Battery ki current capacity ko original capacity se compare karke

questions.explanation: State of Health (SOH) battery ki current performance ko uski original factory performance se compare karke determine kiya jaata hai, jo uski overall degradation ko darshata hai.

questions.question: High voltage system par kaam karte samay 'insulation tester' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Current flow measure karna

questions.explanation: Insulation tester high voltage cables aur components ke insulation ki integrity ko check karta hai. Agar insulation weak ho toh electric shock ya component failure ka risk hota hai.

questions.question: EV mein 'cooling system' ka maintenance kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Interior cabin ko thanda rakhne ke liye
options.B: Battery aur motor ko overheat hone se bachane ke liye
options.C: Power steering ko operate karne ke liye
options.D: Brakes ko lubricate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: EV cooling system battery aur motor jaise critical components ko optimum temperature par maintain karta hai. Regular maintenance unki efficiency aur life ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: EV mein 'auxiliary battery' (12V battery) ka kya function hai?

options.B: Low voltage accessories aur systems ko power dena
options.C: High voltage battery ko charge karna

questions.explanation: Auxiliary 12V battery low voltage systems jaise headlights, infotainment, power windows aur vehicle ki startup electronics ko power deti hai.

questions.question: EV mein 'tire rotation' kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Tires ka even wear ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Brakes ko thanda rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Tire rotation tires ka even wear ensure karta hai, jisse unki life badhti hai aur vehicle ki handling aur safety maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: Agar EV mein koi high voltage component replace karna ho, toh kya procedure follow karna chahiye?

options.B: High voltage system ko disable aur safety protocols follow karna
options.C: Sirf gloves pehn kar kaam karna

questions.explanation: High voltage components ko replace karte samay, high voltage system ko disable karna (service disconnect plug remove karna) aur proper safety protocols ko follow karna anivarya hai.

questions.question: EV ke 'suspension system' ka regular check kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Charging time kam karne ke liye
options.B: Ride comfort, handling aur tire wear ke liye
options.C: Battery temperature control karne ke liye
options.D: Motor noise kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Suspension system ka regular check ride comfort, vehicle handling aur tire wear ke liye zaroori hai, khaas kar EVs mein jo battery pack ke kaaran heavy hote hain.

questions.question: EV mein 'HVAC system' ka kya role hai aur uska maintenance kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Cabin heating aur cooling; passenger comfort ke liye

questions.explanation: HVAC (Heating, Ventilation, and Air Conditioning) system cabin heating aur cooling provide karta hai, jo passenger comfort ke liye zaroori hai. Iska maintenance system ki efficiency maintain karta hai.

questions.question: EV mein battery pack leak hone par kya action lena chahiye?

options.B: Leakage area ko touch karna
options.C: Immediately safety protocols follow karna, area ko ventilate karna aur qualified personnel ko inform karna
options.D: Battery pack ko paani se dhona

questions.explanation: Battery pack leakage hazardous ho sakta hai. Immediately safety protocols follow karein, area ko acche se ventilate karein aur qualified personnel ko inform karein. Leakage ko kabhi bhi touch na karein.

questions.question: EV mein 'Diagnostic Trouble Codes' (DTCs) ko clear karne se pehle kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Root cause ko identify aur repair karna

questions.explanation: DTCs ko clear karne se pehle underlying fault ya root cause ko identify aur repair karna bahut zaroori hai, anyatha fault dobara aa jaayega. DTCs sirf symptoms batate hain.

questions.question: EV mein 'power steering fluid' ka level check karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: EVs mein electric power steering hota hai jisme fluid ki zaroorat nahi hoti
options.B: Brakes ko operate karne ke liye
options.C: Motor ko lubricate karne ke liye
options.D: Battery ko thanda rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Most modern EVs mein Electric Power Steering (EPS) system hota hai, jismein hydraulic fluid ki zaroorat nahi padti. Isliye power steering fluid level check karna EV maintenance ka part nahi hai.

questions.question: EV service karte samay 'safety interlocks' ka kya role hai?

options.B: High voltage system ko automatically disable karna jab koi access panel khula ho

questions.explanation: Safety interlocks devices hote hain jo high voltage system ko automatically disable kar dete hain jab koi high voltage component ka access panel ya service door khola jaata hai, jisse technicians ki safety ensure hoti hai.

questions.question: 'Vehicle-to-Grid' (V2G) technology ka ek potential fayda kya hai?

options.A: EVs ko sirf ghar par charge karna
options.B: EVs ko power grid ke liye energy storage ke roop mein use karna
options.C: EVs ko sirf solar power se chalana
options.D: EVs ko bina charger ke charge karna

questions.explanation: V2G technology EVs ko power grid ke liye distributed energy storage ke roop mein use karne ka potential rakhti hai, jisse grid stability badhti hai aur renewable energy ka better use hota hai.

questions.question: Autonomous EVs (self-driving cars) mein sabse important technology kaun si hai?

options.B: Advanced sensors aur AI

questions.explanation: Autonomous EVs advanced sensors (cameras, radar, lidar) aur Artificial Intelligence (AI) ka use karte hain apne surroundings ko sense karne aur drive karne ke liye.

questions.question: EVs ke through 'carbon footprint' kam karne ka main tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Zero tailpipe emissions provide karna
options.D: Sirf white colour ki gaadiyan kharidna

questions.explanation: EVs zero tailpipe emissions provide karte hain, jisse local air pollution aur greenhouse gas emissions kam hote hain, khas kar agar electricity renewable sources se bani ho.

questions.question: 'Sustainable mobility' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf private vehicles ka use karna
options.B: Transportation options jo environmental, social aur economic needs ko balance karte hain

questions.explanation: Sustainable mobility aise transportation options ko refer karti hai jo long-term mein environmental damage kam kare, social equity badhaye aur economic viability maintain kare.

questions.question: EV battery recycling ka ek fayda kya hai?

options.B: Expensive rare earth metals ko recover karna

questions.explanation: EV battery recycling se valuable aur expensive rare earth metals jaise Lithium, Cobalt, Nickel ko recover kiya ja sakta hai, jo naye battery production ke liye use ho sakte hain.

questions.question: India mein EV manufacturing ko boost karne ke liye government kya kar rahi hai?

options.A: EVs par tax badha rahi hai
options.B: FAME India jaisi schemes aur production-linked incentives de rahi hai
options.C: Petrol cars ko promote kar rahi hai
options.D: EV charging stations ko band kar rahi hai

questions.explanation: Government FAME India scheme, PLI (Production Linked Incentive) schemes aur other policies ke through EV manufacturing aur adoption ko promote kar rahi hai.

questions.question: EVs ko 'silent vehicles' kyon kehte hain?

options.B: Unmein engine noise nahi hota

questions.explanation: EVs ko silent vehicles kehte hain kyuki unmein internal combustion engine nahi hota, isliye woh ICE vehicles ke comparison mein bahut kam noise create karte hain.

questions.question: EVs mein 'bi-directional charging' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf ek direction mein charge karna
options.B: Vehicle se grid tak aur grid se vehicle tak power flow karna

questions.explanation: Bi-directional charging (V2G ka ek part) mein power vehicle ki battery se grid mein ja sakti hai aur grid se vehicle mein bhi aa sakti hai, jisse grid management mein flexibility milti hai.

questions.question: EV battery ke 'second life' applications ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Usi EV mein dobara use karna
options.B: Kam demanding applications mein use karna, jaise grid storage

questions.explanation: EV batteries jab vehicle use ke liye apni capacity kho deti hain, toh unhe kam demanding applications jaise grid-scale energy storage ya residential backup power mein 'second life' di ja sakti hai.

questions.question: EV market mein 'gigafactory' term kyon use hota hai?

options.A: Bahut bade charging station ke liye
options.B: Bahut bade EV battery manufacturing plants ke liye
options.C: Bahut bade EV showroom ke liye
options.D: Bahut bade EV service center ke liye

questions.explanation: Gigafactory ek term hai jo bahut bade scale par EV batteries aur related components manufacture karne wale plants ke liye use hota hai, jaise Tesla ki gigafactories.

questions.question: EVs ke adoption se urban areas mein kaun sa pollution kam ho sakta hai?

options.B: Noise pollution aur air pollution

questions.explanation: EVs ke adoption se urban areas mein noise pollution (engine noise kam hone se) aur air pollution (zero tailpipe emissions se) kam hota hai, jisse shahar zyada livable bante hain.

questions.question: Fuel Cell Electric Vehicles (FCEVs) ka ek challenge kya hai?

options.B: Hydrogen infrastructure ki kami

questions.explanation: FCEVs ka ek major challenge hydrogen production, storage aur distribution ke liye extensive infrastructure ki kami hai, jo unke wide adoption ko limit karta hai.

questions.question: EV technology mein 'solid-state batteries' ka kya potential fayda hai?

options.B: Behtar safety, zyada energy density aur faster charging

questions.explanation: Solid-state batteries future EV technology hain jinka potential fayda behtar safety (no flammable liquid electrolyte), zyada energy density (longer range) aur faster charging hai.

questions.question: India mein EV charging infrastructure develop karne mein kya challenges hain?

options.B: High initial investment aur grid capacity issues

questions.explanation: India mein EV charging infrastructure develop karne ke major challenges mein high initial investment, limited grid capacity, aur reliable power supply ki availability shamil hai.

questions.question: EVs ke 'Total Cost of Ownership' (TCO) mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Purchase price, running cost, maintenance, aur resale value

questions.explanation: TCO mein vehicle ki purchase price, electricity/fuel cost, insurance, maintenance, repairs, aur resale value jaise sabhi expenses shamil hote hain, jo long-term cost ko darshate hain.

questions.question: EVs ko promoting karne se 'energy security' kaise badhti hai?

options.A: Petrol aur diesel par dependency badh jaati hai
options.B: Imported crude oil par dependency kam hoti hai
options.C: Sirf foreign battery suppliers par dependency badhti hai
options.D: Domestic electricity production par koi asar nahi padta

questions.explanation: EVs ko promote karne se imported crude oil par dependency kam hoti hai, kyuki vehicles electricity par chalte hain, jo domestic sources se produce ho sakti hai, jisse desh ki energy security badhti hai.
